name: Kubernetes Node Group Scaling
description: Scale Kubernetes node group to handle increased workload demands

template.description: Scaling Kubernetes node group from {{currentNodes}} to {{targetNodes}} nodes ({{instanceType}}). Current average CPU utilization is {{avgCPU}}%. Scaling will add capacity for growing workload demands while maintaining pod distribution and availability.
template.currentState: Node group with {{currentNodes}} {{instanceType}} instances across 3 AZs. Current CPU utilization: {{avgCPU}}%. Cluster autoscaler enabled with min {{currentNodes}}, max {{currentNodes}}. Pod scheduling pressure observed during peak hours.
template.proposedState: Expanded node group with {{targetNodes}} nodes. Update autoscaler limits to min {{targetNodes}}, max {{targetNodes * 1.5}}. Gradual scale-up to allow pod rescheduling. Monitor for resource utilization and pod distribution across new nodes.
template.trafficPatterns: Variable workload with daily peaks. CPU-intensive applications including data processing, ML inference, and API services. Memory usage stable at 60%. Network traffic increases during peak hours with burst capacity needed.
